name: TV Lounge
raw_about_text: An intimate venue known for its techno and house music events, TV Lounge is a cornerstone of the Detroit electronic music scene with indoor and outdoor stages.

name: Marble Bar
raw_about_text: Marble Bar is a popular electronic music destination in Detroit featuring a large outdoor patio and a dark, moody interior stage perfect for underground events.

name: Spot Lite Detroit
raw_about_text: Spot Lite is a multi-purpose creative space combining a bar, record store, and event venue, hosting diverse electronic music events and art exhibitions.

name: El Club
raw_about_text: El Club is a vibrant music venue in Southwest Detroit that hosts a wide range of genres including cutting-edge electronic music and community-focused events.

name: Leland City Club
raw_about_text: Located in the historic Leland Hotel, Leland City Club is a legendary industrial/goth/techno venue known for its dark atmosphere and late-night underground parties.
